opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes feel like they're full of broken glass, my mouth is so dry I can't swallow, and my whole body aches. It's been getting much worse over the last two days and I honestly can't function.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's suddenly got so bad I couldn't eat anything solid today and I've been stuck in bed — I couldn't wait for a normal appointment.

symptom_narrative.onset: the last couple of days, but I've had the dryness for years
symptom_narrative.duration: flared up badly over about 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: burning, gritty, like sand or broken glass in both eyes, and my mouth is completely parched
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — the worst it's been, I can't keep my eyes open in the light
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both eyes, my mouth and tongue, and aching in my hands and knees
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sipping water lets me talk for a bit, and the eye drops help for a minute
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: bright light, and it's awful when I wake up — my eyes feel stuck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I'm exhausted, completely wiped out, and my joints ache
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get flares now and then but nothing this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been bedbound today and couldn't eat solid food

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an autoimmune condition that dries out my eyes and mouth — the doctors called it Sjögren's
past_medical_history.how_managed: eye drops and saliva sprays, and I see a specialist sometimes

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: every 30 minutes but they're barely helping

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own, so I'm a bit worried about coping and eating properly while I'm like this

objective_data_offered.value: both eyes look very red and bloodshot; she keeps them shut and flinches in the light; she sips water constantly to be able to speak
tongue looks red and dry with a bumpy surface and no pooled saliva underneath
mild fullness over both cheeks in front of the ears, the same on each side; not red and not obviously tender when she touches them
knuckles of both hands look a little puffy and feel achy and stiff
37.1 C on a home thermometer this morning — no fever that I can tell
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: lots of empty water bottles and used over-the-counter eye drop bottles by the bed
